append-a4-page.title: Append an Empty A4 Page to PDF
append-a4-page.description: Loads an existing PDF, appends an empty A4‑sized page at the end, and saves the result.

insert-blank-page.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position
insert-blank-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page at a specific index in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

copy-page-size-insert-page.title: Copy Page Size and Insert New Page at Specific Position
copy-page-size-insert-page.description: Demonstrates how to copy the dimensions of page two and insert a new page with the same size at position five in a PDF document.

add-multiple-empty-pages.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add several empty pages to a PDF by iterating over a list of page counts.

read-page-dimensions.title: Read Page Dimensions from PDF
read-page-dimensions.description: Creates a sample PDF, then loads it and logs each page's width and height to the console.

change-page-size-letter.title: Change PDF Page Size to Letter Format
change-page-size-letter.description: Demonstrates how to set the size of a specific PDF page (page 7) to Letter format using the SetPageSize method.

resize-pages-a5.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5 Size
resize-pages-a5.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a PDF's pages and resize each one to the A5 paper size.

rotate-page-four-90-degrees.title: Rotate Fourth Page 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-page-four-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate the fourth page of a PDF by 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-odd-pages-orientation.title: Convert Odd Pages from Landscape to Portrait
convert-odd-pages-orientation.description: Creates a PDF with mixed orientation pages and then changes all odd-numbered pages from landscape to portrait by adjusting their MediaBox.

move-page-nine-first.title: Move Page Nine to First Position in PDF
move-page-nine-first.description: Demonstrates how to move the ninth page of a PDF to the first position using Aspose.Pdf's PageCollection.Move method.

reorder-pdf-pages.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using Custom Sequence
reorder-pdf-pages.description: Creates a sample PDF, then reorders its pages based on a custom integer array and saves the result.

delete-last-three-pages.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete the last three pages of a PDF using PageCollection.Delete.

insert-custom-page.title: Insert Custom-Sized Empty Page at Beginning of PDF
insert-custom-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert an empty page with specific dimensions at the start of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

append-page.title: Append a Page from Another PDF to Existing PDF
append-page.description: Demonstrates loading two PDFs, appending a page from the second PDF to the first, and saving the combined document.

rotate-all-pages-180.title: Rotate All Pages 180 Degrees in PDF
rotate-all-pages-180.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every page of a PDF by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

convert-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape by Swapping MediaBox Dimensions
convert-portrait-to-landscape.description: Creates a sample PDF and then swaps the width and height of each page's MediaBox to change orientation from portrait to landscape.

insert-blank-page-after-each-page.title: Insert Blank Page After Each Existing Page
insert-blank-page-after-each-page.description: Demonstrates how to double the page count of a PDF by inserting a blank page after every existing page.

set-page-rotation-parity.title: Set Page Rotation Based on Page Number Parity
set-page-rotation-parity.description: Creates a sample PDF and rotates odd-numbered pages 90 degrees while keeping even pages unrotated.

export-page-dimensions-csv.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-page-dimensions-csv.description: Creates a sample PDF, then reads each page's width and height and writes them to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-page-at-index.title: Insert Page from External PDF at Specific Index
insert-page-at-index.description: Shows how to insert a page from another PDF into a document at index two while preserving the original page size and rotation.

set-custom-page-size.title: Set Custom Page Size for First Page
set-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of the first page of a PDF to custom dimensions (500 × 700 points) using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

rotate-pages-reverse.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
rotate-pages-reverse.description: Creates a sample PDF, then opens it and rotates each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page.

move-pages-to-end.title: Move Pages 3-6 to End of PDF
move-pages-to-end.description: Demonstrates moving a range of pages (3‑6) to the end of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-mediabox.title: Copy MediaBox from one page to another
copy-mediabox.description: Demonstrates how to copy the MediaBox rectangle from page 8 and apply it to page 12 to unify page dimensions.

insert-ten-empty-pages-midpoint.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at Document Midpoint
insert-ten-empty-pages-midpoint.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the middle of a PDF and insert ten empty pages at that position.

resize-wide-pages-a4.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
resize-wide-pages-a4.description: Demonstrates how to resize only PDF pages wider than 600 points to A4 size while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

delete-pages-from-config.title: Delete PDF Pages Based on Configuration File
delete-pages-from-config.description: Creates a sample PDF, reads a list of page numbers from a text file, deletes those pages, and saves the result.

reorder-pages-descending.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
reorder-pages-descending.description: Demonstrates how to reorder the pages of a PDF so they appear in descending numeric order using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

convert-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert All PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-pages-to-portrait.description: Creates a sample PDF with a landscape page, then changes every page to portrait by adjusting the MediaBox dimensions.

conditional-rotate-pages.title: Conditionally Rotate PDF Pages
conditional-rotate-pages.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every third page of a PDF by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

delete-first-page.title: Delete First Page from PDF
delete-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete the first page of a PDF document, causing subsequent pages to shift forward.

resize-pages-to-largest.title: Resize PDF Pages to Largest Page Size
resize-pages-to-largest.description: Shows how to resize all pages in a PDF so that each page matches the dimensions of the largest page in the document, creating a uniform page size.

reset-page-rotation.title: Reset Page Rotation to Original Orientation
reset-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF page and then restore it to its original orientation using the Page.Rotate property.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to the dimensions of a template PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

rotate-pdf-pages.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Custom Angles
rotate-pdf-pages.description: Creates a sample PDF and rotates each page according to angles defined in a dictionary.

add-transparent-separator-page.title: Add Transparent Separator Page to PDF
add-transparent-separator-page.description: Demonstrates inserting an empty page with a transparent background between existing pages in a PDF.

delete-last-page.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
delete-last-page.description: Loads each PDF in a specified folder, removes its last page, and saves the modified file.

move-page-between-pdfs.title: Move a Page Between PDFs Preserving Rotation and Size
move-page-between-pdfs.description: Demonstrates moving a single page from one PDF to another while keeping its original rotation and dimensions.

batch-resize-pages.title: Batch Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width
batch-resize-pages.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to a fixed width of 800 points while preserving the original aspect ratio.

delete-pages-from-list.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using a List File
delete-pages-from-list.description: Demonstrates how to read page numbers from a text file and delete those pages from a PDF document.

reorder-pages-by-orientation.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation
reorder-pages-by-orientation.description: Creates a sample PDF, then reorders its pages so that all landscape pages appear before portrait pages.

add-blank-page-with-label.title: Add Blank Page with Custom Roman Numeral Page Label
add-blank-page-with-label.description: Shows how to insert a blank page at the start of a PDF and assign a custom page label using lowercase Roman numerals (i) for front‑matter numbering.

resize-pdf-pages.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
resize-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF so that content is scaled proportionally to fit within a 595 × 842 point printable area.

insert-empty-page-custom-size.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size
insert-empty-page-custom-size.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new empty page into a PDF and set its size based on runtime input supplied via command‑line arguments.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template__v2.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template__v2.description: Resizes every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF.

add-header-margininfo.title: Add Header to First PDF Page Using MarginInfo
add-header-margininfo.description: Demonstrates how to add a text header to the first page of a PDF and configure its margins using Aspose.Pdf.

add-html-header-first-three-pages.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
add-html-header-first-three-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add an HTML header with embedded CSS styling to the first three pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-generation-date-footer.title: Add Generation Date Footer to PDF Pages
add-generation-date-footer.description: Demonstrates how to add a text footer with the current generation date to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Repeating Text Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add a diagonal repeating text watermark to each page of a PDF using WatermarkArtifact.

add-dynamic-year-watermark.title: Add Dynamic Year Watermark to PDF
add-dynamic-year-watermark.description: Demonstrates adding a text watermark that includes the current year to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-curved-text-watermark.title: Add Curved Text Watermark to PDF
add-curved-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add a text watermark that follows a curved path using WatermarkArtifact.

add-light-gray-background.title: Add Light Gray Background to All PDF Pages
add-light-gray-background.description: Demonstrates how to set a light gray background color for every page in a PDF using Aspose.PDF.

set-transparent-page-background.title: Set Transparent Page Background for PDF Overlay
set-transparent-page-background.description: Demonstrates how to make the background of each PDF page transparent, which is useful when overlaying PDFs.

set-page-background-color.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB Values
set-page-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to set the background color of a PDF page using RGB values with Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-page-background-cmyk.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
set-page-background-cmyk.description: Demonstrates how to set the background color of a PDF page using CMYK color components for accurate print fidelity.

set-page-background-hsl.title: Set Page Background Color Using HSL Values
set-page-background-hsl.description: Demonstrates how to convert HSL color values to RGB and apply the resulting Aspose.Pdf.Color as a page background.

set-page-background.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Based on Theme
set-page-background.description: Demonstrates reading a simple theme configuration file and applying a corresponding background color to all pages of a PDF.

alternate-page-background.title: Alternate Page Background Colors in PDF
alternate-page-background.description: Demonstrates how to set alternating background colors (LightGray and White) for each page in a PDF using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

add-centered-page-numbers.title: Add Centered Page Numbers to PDF
add-centered-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to add a centered page number stamp starting at 1 to every page of a PDF document.

add-roman-numeral-page-numbers.title: Add Roman Numeral Page Numbers to Introductory Pages
add-roman-numeral-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers in Roman numerals to the first pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-prefix-page-numbers.title: Add Custom Prefix Page Numbers to PDF
add-custom-prefix-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers with a custom "Chapter" prefix to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-leading-zeros.title: Add Page Numbers with Leading Zeros to PDF
add-page-numbers-leading-zeros.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers padded with a leading zero for single‑digit pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-page-numbers.title: Add Custom Page Numbers to PDF
add-custom-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to add a "Page X of Y" footer to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-custom-page-numbers__v2.title: Add Custom Page Numbers with Separator
add-custom-page-numbers__v2.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers in the format current/total on each page of a PDF.

insert-page-numbers-with-superscript-for.title: Insert Page Numbers With Superscript Formatting For Footnote References On Pdf Pages

add-page-numbers-custom-font.title: Add Page Numbers with Custom Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-custom-font.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers using Arial 14pt font on each page of a PDF.

add-odd-page-numbers.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd Pages in PDF
add-odd-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers only on odd-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-page-numbers-even-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Even Pages in PDF
add-page-numbers-even-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers only on even-numbered pages of a PDF using a loop.

add-bates-numbering-stamp.title: Add Bates Numbering Stamp to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbering to each page of a PDF, starting at 1000 and using a dash separator.

add-bates-numbering.title: Add Bates Numbering with Prefix and Suffix to PDF
add-bates-numbering.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds Bates numbering with a custom prefix "DOC" and suffix "-2026" to each page.

add-bates-numbering__v2.title: Add Alphanumeric Bates Numbering to PDF
add-bates-numbering__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbering with a custom alphanumeric prefix to each page of a PDF document.

add-bates-numbering__v3.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering__v3.description: Demonstrates how to add year‑based Bates numbering (e.g., 2026‑0001) to each page of a PDF using Aspose.PDF.

add-bates-numbering-increment-5.title: Add Bates Numbering with Increment of 5 to PDFs
add-bates-numbering-increment-5.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files and add Bates numbering starting at 5 (increment of 5 per page) using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-add-bates-numbering.title: Remove and Add Bates Numbering to PDF
remove-add-bates-numbering.description: Demonstrates how to delete existing Bates numbering artifacts from a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence.

remove-bates-numbering.title: Remove Bates Numbering from PDF Pages
remove-bates-numbering.description: Demonstrates how to delete Bates numbering artifacts from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-headers-footers.title: Remove Existing Headers and Footers and Add New Ones
remove-headers-footers.description: Demonstrates how to clear any existing header/footer artifacts from a PDF and add new header and footer content.

read-pdf-page-count.title: Read PDF Page Count
read-pdf-page-count.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF and retrieve the total number of pages without saving the document.

read-page-dimensions__v2.title: Read Page Dimensions from PDF
read-page-dimensions__v2.description: Creates a sample PDF and then reads and logs the width and height of each page in the document.

adjust-bleedbox.title: Adjust BleedBox of PDF Pages for Printer Specifications
adjust-bleedbox.description: Loads a PDF, expands each page's BleedBox by a specified margin, and saves the updated document.

retrieve-trimbox-after-cropping.title: Retrieve TrimBox after Cropping a PDF Page
retrieve-trimbox-after-cropping.description: Loads a PDF, sets a CropBox on the first page, then reads the TrimBox to verify the content area.

set-cropbox-remove-margins.title: Set CropBox to Remove Margins from PDF Pages
set-cropbox-remove-margins.description: Creates a sample PDF, then sets the CropBox of each page to the content bounding box, effectively removing page margins.

set-bleedbox.title: Set BleedBox Extending Beyond CropBox
set-bleedbox.description: Demonstrates how to set each page's BleedBox to extend 5 points beyond its CropBox, creating a bleed area.

trim-white-space.title: Trim White Space from PDF Pages with Custom Tolerance
trim-white-space.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the TrimBox of each PDF page by a custom pixel tolerance to remove surrounding white space.

crop-pages-4-3-aspect.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
crop-pages-4-3-aspect.description: Creates a sample PDF and then crops each page to a 4:3 aspect ratio suitable for presentation slides.

add-bold-uppercase-header.title: Add Bold Uppercase Header to PDF Pages
add-bold-uppercase-header.description: Demonstrates how to add a bold, uppercase header to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.
